slides.title: The water you drink may be *quietly aging you*.
slides.sub: Tap water can carry lead and PFAS forever chemicals. A simple filter is one of the easiest upgrades for your healthspan.

slides.title: Forever chemicals linger
slides.body: PFAS are called *forever chemicals* because they barely break down. They can build up in your body and water supply for years.

slides.title: Lead has no safe level
slides.body: Old pipes can leach lead into tap water. There is *no safe amount*, and low-level exposure is linked to long-term harm.

slides.title: It adds up over time
slides.body: PFAS exposure *is linked to* effects on hormones, kidneys and metabolism. The risk is the slow, daily accumulation.

slides.title: Choose a certified filter
slides.body: Look for filters certified to reduce lead and PFAS. A good one *can cut chronic exposure* without changing your routine.

slides.title: Make clean water default
slides.body: Keep filtered water within reach and your switch sticks. Small daily choices *compound into healthspan* over the years.

slides.title: Protect the *basics* that compound.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns small habits like hydration, sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily Health Score, so the basics never slip.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
You filter your coffee and your air. Your drinking water deserves the same. 💧🌿

Lead and PFAS forever chemicals can build up quietly over years, and a certified filter is one of the simplest ways to cut chronic exposure. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the daily basics into one simple score → link in bio.
